description: Hindu festival calendar for 2026–2028 with Aarti associations

festivals.name: Makar Sankranti
festivals.description: The harvest festival celebrating the sun's northward journey.

festivals.name: Vasant Panchami
festivals.description: Celebration of spring and worship of Goddess Saraswati.

festivals.name: Maha Shivaratri
festivals.description: The great night of Lord Shiva — fasting and night-long worship.

festivals.name: Holi
festivals.description: Festival of colors celebrating the divine love of Radha-Krishna.

festivals.name: Ram Navami
festivals.description: Birthday celebration of Lord Rama.

festivals.name: Hanuman Jayanti
festivals.description: Birthday of Lord Hanuman — devotion and strength.

festivals.name: Guru Purnima
festivals.description: Day honoring spiritual teachers and Sage Vyasa.

festivals.name: Raksha Bandhan
festivals.description: Festival celebrating the bond of protection between siblings.

festivals.name: Janmashtami
festivals.description: Birthday of Lord Krishna — midnight celebration.

festivals.name: Ganesh Chaturthi
festivals.description: Birthday of Lord Ganesha — 10-day celebration.

festivals.name: Navratri
festivals.description: Nine nights of Goddess Durga worship.

festivals.name: Dussehra
festivals.description: Victory of good over evil — Lord Rama's triumph.

festivals.name: Diwali
festivals.description: Festival of lights — worship of Goddess Lakshmi.
